non_blocking_issues: Issue 3: dser disagrees with gpter/maxer — argues agent path HAS a real clobber via launchLoadMessages overwriting selectedAgentName from history when per-session agent is null. Defensive fix applied (only sync when per-session exists). Symptom may differ from user's 'second message' report but root cause is same cross-file state inconsistency.

Issue 1: changing rememberLazyListState to remember(sessionId){LazyListState()} interacts with savedPositions restore timing — verify restore LaunchedEffect runs before first visible frame after session switch.
Issue 4: exact SSE event type for rate-limit not confirmed against local server source; session.error hypothesis based on Message.kt schema + maxer web search.

issues_reviewed.title: Tab horizontal-swipe flicker
issues_reviewed.root_cause: Two mechanisms: (a) tap-reorder slot reuse with unkeyed LazyListState; (b) pure-swipe switchTo sets messages=emptyList then restores from cache — blank flash between slice updates.

issues_reviewed.title: First slash-command in draft errors
issues_reviewed.root_cause: executeCommand currentSessionId ?: error; no materialization. /clear local-only correct.

issues_reviewed.title: agent/model switch one-message lag
issues_reviewed.root_cause: Model path correct (per-session wins). Agent path: launchLoadMessages:233 overwrites selectedAgentName from inferred history when per-session agent null. Repro: global=plan, open old session (no per-session agent, last assistant=build) → selectedAgentName clobbered to build.
issues_reviewed.fix: Defensive: persist agent in materializeDraftSession; only sync selectedAgentName when perSessionAgent != null. SSE message.updated does NOT touch currentModel (verified applyMessageUpdated).

issues_reviewed.title: Rate-limit/quota errors invisible
issues_reviewed.root_cause: SSE when no error/else; isEffectivelyRenderableEmpty filters error-only messages (doesn't check message.error).
issues_reviewed.fix: session.error branch + else; filter checks msg.error?.message non-blank. New lightweight ChatErrorCard preferred over CompletedTaskCard reuse (semantic mismatch).

issues_reviewed.title: Server switch loses model-disable config
issues_reviewed.root_cause: by-URL key but URL edit orphans; configureServer no HostProfileSwitched. Key normalization collision (host case, scheme strip).
issues_reviewed.fix: by-URL (user intent); clear on edit/delete/configureServer; manual refresh inherit ∩; lowercase host in normalizeBaseUrl; include path in identity.

notes: dser's cross-file state-consistency analysis found the agent clobber that gpter/maxer considered inert. The defensive fix (guard selectedAgentName write) addresses it. Disagreement on Issue 3 root cause is documented but does not block release — the fix is sound regardless of which reviewer's mechanism the user actually hit.
